notes: Agent produced comprehensive, well-structured markdown report exceeding requirements. Correctly identified task retries (m_000006_1, m_000007_1), HDFS IOException, and provided excellent root-cause analysis. Found 3 WARN entries (vs 4 expected, though specification itself is ambiguous about count). Provided 8 concrete prevention recommendations. Minor deduction: some sections redundant/verbose (two identical markdown files created), and distinction between 'speculative execution' vs 'retries' adds unnecessary nuance versus simpler expected output. Overall execution was excellent with deep insights into transient failures, DataNode issues, and normal post-success container cleanup patterns.
